name: Spicy Clam Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese in a food processor.
2. Add clam juice and mustard to the processed cream cheese.
3. Process until well mixed.
4. Add Worcestershire, horseradish, onions, and hot pepper sauce.
5. Process again until well mixed.
6. Gently fold in the minced clams by hand until just combined.
7. Season with salt and white pepper.
8. Cover and chill.
9. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
